title: Intensely Aromatic Brazilian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Brazilian chicken stew cooked in a banana leaf, perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring the warmth of nutmeg and the freshness of grassy notes, this dish is flexitarian-friendly and can be easily adapted to suit various tastes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, onion, garlic, nutmeg, and black pepper until the chicken is evenly coated.
Lay a banana leaf flat on a work surface and brush the center with olive oil.
Place one quarter of the chicken mixture in the center of the banana leaf, then spoon some coconut milk and diced tomatoes over the top.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a tight packet, and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Place the packets in a large baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 45 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
Remove the packets from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
